# Logan Dapp

> Logan Dapp: software, embedded, mechanical -- three engineers, one
> brain. This site (logand.app) is his personal site and portfolio, and
> is itself one of his projects: a FastAPI + Postgres backend, a
> React/TypeScript frontend, a Rust/WASM ASCII renderer for the animated
> background, and a native Android companion app, all built, deployed,
> and maintained end to end by him.

## Pages

- [Home](https://logand.app/): who Logan is, one-line summary, and
  primary navigation.
- [Projects](https://logand.app/projects): a chronological feed of real
  projects -- software, embedded electronics, mechanical/FEA
  engineering, ML research, and teaching -- each with a description,
  timeframe, and links to source code or writeups where available.
- [Contact](https://logand.app/contact): real, current contact
  channels (email, GitHub, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, phone), each
  with reliability notes where relevant.

## Notes for agents

- Structured data (schema.org JSON-LD: `Person`, `ItemList` of
  `SoftwareSourceCode`/`CreativeWork`) is embedded in each page and is
  the most reliable way to extract project/contact details
  programmatically.
- `/admin/*`, `/portal`, and `/invoices` are authenticated,
  non-public application surfaces -- not part of this site's public
  content and disallowed in robots.txt.
